heroHeadline: US–Iran Ceasefire Expires; Vance Flies to Islamabad as Iran Delegation Arrives in Last-Minute Reversal
heroSubtitle: The 14-day US–Iran ceasefire expires April 21 as VP Vance and Witkoff travel to Pakistan for talks — Iran initially refused but reversed course. Trump threatens to resume war. DRC–M23 ceasefire verification mechanism begins initial missions. Ukraine–Russia talks stalled over territorial demands. Colombia's ELN process frozen 15+ months. 10 ceasefires in force globally.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN, African Union, IGAD, Crisis Group, USIP, PA-X Database, and Tier 1–3 sources across all media poles.
